career_angle: AI agent engineering is the fastest-growing role in tech. If you can build reliable agent systems, you're in high demand.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: 'Moonshot Kimi K2.5 - Beats Sonnet 4.5 at half the cost, S...' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%)

factors.name: Reproducibility
factors.rationale: 'Moonshot Kimi K2.5 - Beats Sonnet 4.5 at half the cost, S...' -- no code, methodology, or reproducibility details provided

factors.name: Conflict of Interest
factors.rationale: 'Moonshot Kimi K2.5 - Beats Sonnet 4.5 at half the cost, S...' -- no overt promotional language from AI News (smol.ai), but independence not confirmed

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: hedging language ('up to ') suggests the source itself isn't confident

factors.name: Track Record
